title: Fix wallet QR code to EIP-681 format

log.context: Fix wallet QR code to EIP-681 format

Done. Here's what was changed:

**File:** `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/wallet.html`, line 315

The `QRCode.toCanvas` call was updated from encoding `ADDR` (raw address string) to `'ethereum:' + ADDR + '@8453'` (EIP-681 URI with Base mainnet chain ID). The display address text in the page is unchanged — only the QR code data was modified.
